title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 65.330 - Audited accounts to be on file
text:
65.330.  Audited accounts to be on file. — The accounts so audited, and those rejected, if any, shall be delivered to the township clerk, to be by him kept on file, and subject to the examination of anyone desiring so to do.
(RSMo 1939 § 13979) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12302; 1919 § 13215; 1909 § 11703
